## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run '...'
2. Choose option '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- macOS Version: [e.g., 14.2]
- Chip: [e.g., M1, M2, M3, Intel]
- Terminal: [e.g., Ghostty, iTerm2, Terminal.app]
- Which script: [e.g., install.sh, install-ai-tools.sh]
- Option chosen: [e.g., option 5 - Everything]

## Error Output
```
Paste any error messages here
```

## Already Installed Tools
List any tools you already had installed before running the script:
- [ ] Homebrew
- [ ] Docker
- [ ] nvm
- [ ] Python
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context
Any other information that might help diagnose the issue.

## Logs
If you have logs or screenshots, please attach them.
